description.unified: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing Physical Damage. On critical hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. For each [Wound] stack, this skill's damage is increased by 20% [ (added) , and you are immune to all damage while casting].
Removes your harmful effects and increases Attack and Critical Hit Chance by [500 for 15sec -> 600 for 10 sec].

Performs a series of attacks, dealing Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away. [ (removed) The DMG of this skill is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound], and all stacks are consumed on the final hit.]
On critical hit, increases Attack for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10. [ (added) If [Wound Stacks] is 10, deals additional damage equal to 150% of Attack Power.]

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is changed to increase Critical Damage by [65%->120%], and damage dealt to bosses is increased by 30%.
If there are 5 or more stacks, all damage taken is reduced by 20%. [(removed) Gain 45 Physical Dodge per stack]

description.unified: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}%, and reduces the target's P.Block Chance by 500 for 10 sec. [(removed) increases Armor Penetration by 800 while casting]
[Sharp End] Increases ATK Boost by 50% and recovers additional {0} MP upon a Crit Hit for the skill's duration.
[Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}% and upon a Crit Hit, recovers Mana by 200. [(removed) adds 1 Wound per attack]

dark.unified: When using a skill, has a 10% chance to increase your Critical Damage by [7%->10%]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: Each time a critical hit occurs, for 15 sec your Attack Speed is increased by {0} and Critical Damage is increased by {1}%. This effect stacks up to [8->5] times.
